change_langs_dialog.select_target_lang_label: Choose the language you are studying

nn_recommendation.text: A generative neural network must be used to test your language proficiency and provide information for learning. If you are not yet registered in at least one of the proposed systems, please register.

translate_recommendation.text: If you are not yet that good at the language you are studying, use a translator. Just don’t forget to note that you used it — this is necessary to calculate your progress!

new_essay.textarea_placeholder: Your new essay in the language you are studying
new_essay.checkbox_label: A translator and/or additional materials were used

progress.info_text: Your journey to language proficiency is reflected in the points earned. Every sentence without mistakes brings you closer to perfection, earning 2 points. Mistakes teach us, but subtract 1 point. Aim for the top — 100 points, where every point symbolizes a step towards mastery.
progress.grammar_improvement_recommendation: Your grammar needs improvement. It is recommended to review the basic rules and practice writing simple sentences.

essays.no_data: Your essay list is currently empty
essays.sentences_with_mistakes_label: sentences with mistakes | sentence with mistakes | sentences with mistakes
